overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science-fiction game showing a blue-skinned character with a tail exploring a lush alien river valley. The character walks along a rocky shoreline with exotic purple flora, gradually entering a shallow river and eventually swimming through deeper water. The environment features misty atmosphere, red-leaved trees, and flying creatures in the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien riverbank with exotic megafauna flora

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank, passing large alien flora on the right while approaching the water's edge

notable_agents.action: flying creature circling overhead in the misty sky

entered.detail: tall alien plant with broad purple fan-shaped leaves and spiky trunk
large tree with distinctive red foliage on the riverbank
dense coniferous forest covering the hillside
gravel and stone terrain along the water's edge
calm reflective water surface of the alien river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a misty alien riverbank dominated by a massive purple fan-shaped plant. The terrain is rocky and uneven, with red-leaved trees on the right and a pine forest on the left hillside. Around the 12-second mark, the character steps from the gravel shore into the shallow river water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with submerged obstacles

events.description: wooden Na'vi structure becomes visible on the left bank

agents.ego_description: wading through gradually deepening river water, navigating around submerged logs and rocks

entered.detail: steep rock face rising from the riverbank
primitive wooden platform or shelter on the shore
submerged tree branches and driftwood in the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the shallow river as the water gradually deepens from ankle to knee level. The rocky cliff face rises on the left while a wooden structure appears on the distant shore. The character navigates around submerged logs and branches while heading toward the misty river channel ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep river channel with swimming transition

events.description: water becomes deep enough that character transitions from wading to swimming

agents.ego_description: swimming through deep water after wading as far as possible, moving toward the distant riverbank

entered.detail: dark branches and debris floating in the deep water

segments.scene_description: The water deepens significantly from waist to chest level as the character progresses into the river channel. Around 42 seconds, the character transitions from walking to swimming, submerging partially while continuing forward. The rocky cliffs and red trees frame the misty river corridor as the character swims toward the distant shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a misty alien riverbank into the depths of a flowing river channel. It begins with the character walking across uneven, rocky terrain dominated by a massive purple fan-shaped plant and flanked by red-leaved trees and a hillside pine forest. As the character steps from the gravel shore into the water, the scene shifts to a shallow river where the water gradually rises from ankle to knee level against a towering rocky cliff. The environment then opens into a deeper river channel, with the character navigating around submerged logs and branches toward a distant wooden structure. Finally, the water deepens to chest level, forcing the character to transition from walking to swimming through the misty corridor framed by cliffs and red foliage.
